PytestWarningz.Base class for all warnings emitted by pytest.
pytestN
__name__

9/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/_pytest/warning_types.pyr
PytestAssertRewriteWarningz4Warning emitted by the pytest assert rewrite module.r
PytestCacheWarningz:Warning emitted by the cache plugin in various situations.r
PytestConfigWarningz)Warning emitted for configuration issues.r
PytestCollectionWarningzPWarning emitted when pytest is not able to collect a file or symbol in a module.r
PytestDeprecationWarningzDWarning class for features that will be removed in a future version.r
PytestExperimentalApiWarningz
Warning category used to denote experiments in pytest.
    Use sparingly as the API might change or even be removed completely in a
    future version.
    r
apiname
returnc
Nz:{apiname} is an experimental api that may change over time)
format)
clsr
simple>
z#PytestExperimentalApiWarning.simpleN)
classmethod
strr
PytestUnhandledCoroutineWarningz
Warning emitted for an unhandled coroutine.
    A coroutine was encountered when collecting test functions, but was not
    handled by any async-aware plugin.
    Coroutine test functions are not natively supported.
    r
PytestUnknownMarkWarningzQWarning emitted on use of unknown markers.
    See :ref:`mark` for details.
    r
 PytestUnraisableExceptionWarningz
An unraisable exception was reported.
    Unraisable exceptions are exceptions raised in :meth:`__del__ <object.__del__>`
    implementations and similar situations when the exception cannot be raised
    as normal.
    r
%PytestUnhandledThreadExceptionWarningztAn unhandled exception occurred in a :class:`~threading.Thread`.
    Such exceptions don't propagate normally.
    r
boundc
UnformattedWarningz
A warning meant to be formatted during runtime.
    This is used to hold warnings that need to format their message at runtime,
    as opposed to a direct message.
    r!
type)
kwargsr
zHReturn an instance of the warning category, formatted with given kwargs.)
category
templater
selfr%

typingr
